raw_consumer_statement: I opened up a dispute XXXX with XXXX through my Citi card for returned goods. I returned the merchandise in accordance with their policy and the merchant promised to refund me. Going off of that promise, I decided to withdraw the dispute because it was handled with the merchant. The merchant now is not honoring the return, instead offering to give me a merchandise credit which is not within the terms and conditions of their store. I called Citi and asked to re-open the dispute because I close it under false pretenses and they refused to do so.
